name: M.J. International Co., Ltd.
summary: M.J. International Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development, production, and sales of luxury vinyl tile (LVT) floors. The company offers rigid core, LVT click, non-polyvinyl chloride, LVT dry back wood and stone design, and LVT dry back carpet and exclusive design products for commercial and residential customers. It also engages in the production and sales of titles, and decoration and construction materials. The company operates in Europe, North America, Mainland China, Taiwan, and internationally. M.J. International Co., Ltd. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.
